name: Tomato Mousse
recipeInstructions:
1. Assemble and attach a fruit/vegetable strainer. Process the tomatoes at speed 4 until strained.
2. Combine strained tomatoes, salt, Worcestershire sauce, pepper, chervil, basil, and sugar in a bowl. Set aside.
3. Sprinkle gelatin over water; let stand for 5 minutes to soften. Dissolve gelatin in hot water. Add the dissolved gelatin to the tomato mixture and mix well.
4. Chill the mixture until it has partially set.
5. In a separate bowl, whip the heavy cream with an electric mixer until stiff peaks form.
6. Gently fold the tomato mixture into the whipped cream. Pour the mixture into an oiled 4-cup mold.
7. Refrigerate until set. When ready to serve, unmold and place on a serving platter.
